MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-28-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUDULENT MISREPRESENTATION) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY CAUSATION I.E. HOW DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO DISCLOSE THE ILLEGALITY OF THE UNIT/MISREPRESENTATION OF LEGALITY CAUSED "RENT DAMAGES, RENT DIFFERENTIAL DAMAGES, MOVING EXPENSES, AND EMOTIONAL DISTRESS." BECKWITH V. DAHL (2012) 205 CAL.APP.4TH 1039. DEMURER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. "AN 'IMPLIED' ASSERTION OR REPRESENTATION IS NOT ENOUGH" TO SUPPORT A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION. DIEDIKER V. PEELLE FIN. CORP., 60 CAL. APP. 4TH 288, 297-98. DEMURRER TO THE 5TH-8TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES ALL ELEMENTS OF THESE CAUSES OF ACTION AND STANDING (FAC, PARAGRAPH 13). ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Candice Mulings Williams, Esq. of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP, (415-278-9400), for Gaetani Real Estate, Inc., Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part.

Demurer to the first cause of action (fraudulent misrepresentation) is sustained with leave to amend to allege with requisite specificity causation i.e. how defendant's failure to disclose the illegality of the unit/misrepresentation of legality caused "rent damages, rent differential damages, moving expenses, and emotional distress." Beckwith v. Dahl (2012) 205 Cal.App.4th 1039.

Demurer to the second cause of action (negligent misrepresentation) is sustained without leave to amend. "An 'implied' assertion or representation is not enough" to support a cause of action for negligent misrepresentation. Diediker v. Peelle Fin. Corp., 60 Cal. App. 4th 288, 297-98.

Demurrer to the 5th-8th causes of action is overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges all elements of these causes of action and standing (FAC, paragraph 13).

Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Candice Mulings Williams, Esq. of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP, (415-278-9400), for Gaetani Real Estate, Inc., Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted in part and denied in part. Motion is granted as to the punitive damages allegations with leave to amend to allege facts re: malice, oppression or fraud. Motion is denied as to the allegations regarding SFRO 37.9 and request for attorney's fees. Defendant failed to show that these allegations are irrelevant, improper or false. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
